title: Prentis, Victoria - Attorney General, the Attorney General's Office - ACOBA advice
body: "Ms Prentis left her role at the Attorney General’s Office in July 2024.  Visiting Professor in Law and Politics, Royal Holloway, University of London  Ms Prentis sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Royal Holloway, University of London. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025; and the appointment was taken up in June 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Trustee and Director, Countryside Alliance Foundation  Ms Prentis sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with the Countryside Alliance Foundation. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in March 2025; and the appointment was taken up in May 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Trainer, Advocates for International Development  Ms Prentis sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with the Advocates for International Development. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
